datasets.title: ELITE - Curated 47 (privacy analysis)
datasets.description: The 47-variable privacy-analysis sheet with full sensitivity metadata. Rich, correlated synthetic data (25k subjects / 6k files).

datasets.title: ELITE - v2.0 Full (121 variables)
datasets.description: The full v2.0 harmonisation library. Structurally-valid synthetic data; sensitivity from the sheet's rank column.

datasets.title: ELITE - v3.0 Refined (84 variables)
datasets.description: The v3.0 refined library. Structurally-valid synthetic data.

datasets.title: AD Knowledge Portal - v1.0 (50 variables)
datasets.description: The AD v1.0 set. Sensitivity defaults to Low (sheet had no sensitivity tagging) - demonstrates inference + heuristic SDC.
